title: Nonprofit Current AI is racing to build the World Wide Web of AI, free for all
excerpt: Current AI, a non-profit building AI that leaves no one culture behind, has made remarkable progress across devices, AI chat and more.
content_html:
A farmer in rural India takes a photo of a dying plant. She wants to research it on the internet but she doesn’t speak English. She shouldn’t have to.

That’s the type of problem a nonprofit called Current AI is trying to solve by building open, public AI infrastructure. In February at the India AI Summit, it teamed up with Bhashini, the Indian government’s AI language division. The result became Suno Sutra, Hindi for “listening chronicles,” a pocket-sized, offline device that runs AI in 22 Indian languages, no internet required. “In India, there are hundreds of different languages and dialects, and right now AI is not representing them,” Current AI CEO Ayah Bdeir said in an interview with TechCrunch. The device is open-sourced, available for developer communities to build on.

The nonprofit, founded in February 2025 by Martin Tisne, is moving fast. Last month, it allocated $3.2 million in grants to projects across four organizations; most recently (last week) it launched an open-source AI chatbot at the AI for Good Summit in Geneva.    

Bdeir, joined in January after leading Mozilla’s AI strategy. She previously founded littleBits, the STEM education company that reached millions of kids before selling to Sphero in 2019.

Current AI operates as a “public-private partnership” bringing together governments, companies, and philanthropies to fund public interest tech, she told TechCrunch.  The French government seeded Current AI with $100 million, joined by the Ford Foundation, MacArthur Foundation, DeepMind, and Salesforce — bringing total committed funding to $400 million. “They’re not investors; they’re funders,” Bdeir said.

The problem it aims to solve is straightforward: every major AI system today, from OpenAI to Google to Anthropic, belongs to a private company. “If AI is truly a transformative technology, if it’s going to change every aspect of everyone’s life, there has to be a public alternative,” Bdeir said. “Like the World Wide Web, available to anyone, for free.”

Half the world’s spoken languages face extinction. “And with English driving the largest language models and AI systems, a bulk of the world’s languages and, consequently, cultures and communities are left behind,” Bdeir said.

When asked about Big Tech’s multilingual push, Bdeir drew a sharp distinction. “Big tech builds multilingual models to expand their market,” she said, “regardless of consent or context.” The consequences are concrete. “For Indigenous languages, missionary Bible translations become training data before communities have set any rules,” she said.

Not just about language

An AI’s ability to speak a language is only part of what it needs to learn. “Language is how knowledge, tradition, memory and identity get carried from one generation to the next. So when a technology can’t speak your language, it can’t hold your culture either,” she said.

Her vision for Current AI is an open system modeled on the early web, where improvements benefit everyone, no one gets locked out, and communities keep control of their own data.

Current’s first cohort grant round, announced last month, involved deploying $3.2 million to four organizations across Kenya, Lebanon, and the Brazilian Amazon.

The project in Masakhane, Kenya, involves building AI datasets across more than 50 African languages for health, farming, and education; Lebanon’s Institute for Worldmaking is digitizing Arab cultural history and contemporary practice into machine-readable databases that communities (not tech companies) control. Brazil’s Portal sem Porteiras is building offline AI tools with Indigenous Amazon communities, keeping data within the territory. And Kenya’s African Internet Rights Alliance is developing audit tools to hold AI systems accountable across the continent.

Who owns the data?

On the question of data ownership, Bdeir didn’t mince words. “There are different models and proposals for who owns data in various communities, but one thing is sure: it shouldn’t be a company in Silicon Valley trying to make a select few thousand people wealthier,” she told TechCrunch.

The nonprofit’s approach is to store models and data locally, bringing in community experts before anything is built, or writing consent protocols into the pipeline so communities can halt the process at any point.

None of Current AI’s grantees have fully solved it yet. But Bdeir sees that as the point. “Every one of them has built the question into their work,” she said, “rather than accepting the usual default, where complexity becomes the excuse to let a government or a tech company decide for everyone.”

As for how much progress can be made with a $3.2 million budget split across four organizations, Bdeir says, “Scale is not always the measure. That is the Big Tech paradigm,” she said. “This could look like an Indigenous elder in the Brazilian Amazon using a tool built in Kenya to be able to pass down ecological knowledge in their own language.”  

Building the stack

Earlier this month in Geneva, Current launched Alpha Chat, an open-source chatbot assembled in seven weeks by a coalition of ten organizations, including Hugging Face, Mozilla, and MIT Media Lab. Each contributor brought a piece of the stack, including a language model, safety tooling, and computing power.

Current AI also struck a deal with Sakana AI, a Tokyo-based startup known for its work on what it calls Sovereign AI. The two organizations plan to build a shared open-source AI stack, one designed to support the Japanese language and culture, but also communities across the Global South that dominant AI systems have largely ignored.

When you purchase through links in our articles, we may earn a small commission. This doesn’t affect our editorial independence.

blocks.html_en: A farmer in rural India takes a photo of a dying plant. She wants to research it on the internet but she doesn’t speak English. She shouldn’t have to.

sentences.en: A farmer in rural India takes a photo of a dying plant.
sentences.zh: 印度农村的一位农民拍摄了濒临死亡的植物的照片。

sentences.en: She wants to research it on the internet but she doesn’t speak English.
sentences.zh: 她想在互联网上进行研究，但她不会说英语。

sentences.en: She shouldn’t have to.
sentences.zh: 她不应该这样做。

blocks.html_en: That’s the type of problem a nonprofit called Current AI is trying to solve by building open, public AI infrastructure. In February at the India AI Summit, it teamed up with Bhashini, the Indian government’s AI language division. The result became Suno Sutra, Hindi for “listening chronicles,” a pocket-sized, offline device that runs AI in 22 Indian languages, no internet required. “In India, there are hundreds of different languages and dialects, and right now AI is not representing them,” Current AI CEO Ayah Bdeir said in an interview with TechCrunch. The device is open-sourced, available for developer communities to build on.

sentences.en: That’s the type of problem a nonprofit called Current AI is trying to solve by building open, public AI infrastructure.
sentences.zh: 这就是一家名为 Current AI 的非营利组织试图通过构建开放的公共人工智能基础设施来解决的问题。

sentences.en: In February at the India AI Summit, it teamed up with Bhashini, the Indian government’s AI language division.
sentences.zh: 2 月份的印度人工智能峰会上，它与印度政府人工智能语言部门 Bhashini 合作。

sentences.en: The result became Suno Sutra, Hindi for “listening chronicles,” a pocket-sized, offline device that runs AI in 22 Indian languages, no internet required.
sentences.zh: 结果就是 Suno Sutra，印地语的意思是“聆听编年史”，这是一款口袋大小的离线设备，可以以 22 种印度语言运行人工智能，无需互联网。

sentences.en: “In India, there are hundreds of different languages and dialects, and right now AI is not representing them,” Current AI CEO Ayah Bdeir said in an interview with TechCrunch.
sentences.zh: “在印度，有数百种不同的语言和方言，但目前人工智能并不能代表它们，”现任 AI 首席执行官 Ayah Bdeir 在接受 TechCrunch 采访时表示。

sentences.en: The device is open-sourced, available for developer communities to build on.
sentences.zh: 该设备是开源的，可供开发者社区进行构建。

blocks.html_en: The nonprofit, founded in February 2025 by Martin Tisne, is moving fast. Last month, it allocated $3.2 million in grants to projects across four organizations; most recently (last week) it launched an open-source AI chatbot at the AI for Good Summit in Geneva.

sentences.en: The nonprofit, founded in February 2025 by Martin Tisne, is moving fast.
sentences.zh: 该非营利组织由 Martin Tisne 于 2025 年 2 月创立，目前发展迅速。

sentences.en: Last month, it allocated $3.2 million in grants to projects across four organizations; most recently (last week) it launched an open-source AI chatbot at the AI for Good Summit in Geneva.
sentences.zh: 上个月，它向四个组织的项目拨款 320 万美元；最近（上周），它在日内瓦举行的人工智能公益峰会上推出了一款开源人工智能聊天机器人。

blocks.html_en: Bdeir, joined in January after leading Mozilla’s AI strategy. She previously founded littleBits, the STEM education company that reached millions of kids before selling to Sphero in 2019.

sentences.en: Bdeir, joined in January after leading Mozilla’s AI strategy.
sentences.zh: Bdeir 在领导 Mozilla 的人工智能战略后于 1 月加入。

sentences.en: She previously founded littleBits, the STEM education company that reached millions of kids before selling to Sphero in 2019.
sentences.zh: 她之前创立了littleBits，这是一家 STEM 教育公司，在 2019 年出售给 Sphero 之前，该公司为数百万儿童提供服务。

blocks.html_en: Current AI operates as a “public-private partnership” bringing together governments, companies, and philanthropies to fund public interest tech, she told TechCrunch.  The French government seeded Current AI with $100 million, joined by the Ford Foundation, MacArthur Foundation, DeepMind, and Salesforce — bringing total committed funding to $400 million. “They’re not investors; they’re funders,” Bdeir said.

sentences.en: Current AI operates as a “public-private partnership” bringing together governments, companies, and philanthropies to fund public interest tech, she told TechCrunch.
sentences.zh: 她告诉 TechCrunch，当前的人工智能以“公私合作伙伴关系”的形式运作，将政府、公司和慈善机构聚集在一起，为公益技术提供资金。

sentences.en: The French government seeded Current AI with $100 million, joined by the Ford Foundation, MacArthur Foundation, DeepMind, and Salesforce — bringing total committed funding to $400 million.
sentences.zh: 法国政府向 Current AI 提供了 1 亿美元的种子资金，福特基金会、麦克阿瑟基金会、DeepMind 和 Salesforce 也加入其中，使承诺资金总额达到 4 亿美元。

sentences.en: “They’re not investors; they’re funders,” Bdeir said.
sentences.zh: “他们不是投资者；他们是资助者，”布德尔说。

blocks.html_en: The problem it aims to solve is straightforward: every major AI system today, from OpenAI to Google to Anthropic, belongs to a private company. “If AI is truly a transformative technology, if it’s going to change every aspect of everyone’s life, there has to be a public alternative,” Bdeir said. “Like the World Wide Web, available to anyone, for free.”

sentences.en: The problem it aims to solve is straightforward: every major AI system today, from OpenAI to Google to Anthropic, belongs to a private company.
sentences.zh: 它要解决的问题很简单：当今每个主要的人工智能系统，从 OpenAI 到谷歌再到 Anthropic，都属于一家私营公司。

sentences.en: “If AI is truly a transformative technology, if it’s going to change every aspect of everyone’s life, there has to be a public alternative,” Bdeir said.
sentences.zh: “如果人工智能确实是一项变革性技术，如果它要改变每个人生活的方方面面，就必须有一个公共替代方案，”Bdeir 说。

sentences.en: “Like the World Wide Web, available to anyone, for free.”
sentences.zh: “就像万维网一样，任何人都可以免费使用。”

blocks.html_en: Half the world’s spoken languages face extinction. “And with English driving the largest language models and AI systems, a bulk of the world’s languages and, consequently, cultures and communities are left behind,” Bdeir said.

sentences.en: Half the world’s spoken languages face extinction.
sentences.zh: 世界上一半的口语面临灭绝。

sentences.en: “And with English driving the largest language models and AI systems, a bulk of the world’s languages and, consequently, cultures and communities are left behind,” Bdeir said.
sentences.zh: “随着英语驱动最大的语言模型和人工智能系统，世界上大部分语言以及文化和社区都被抛在了后面，”Bdeir 说。

blocks.html_en: When asked about Big Tech’s multilingual push, Bdeir drew a sharp distinction. “Big tech builds multilingual models to expand their market,” she said, “regardless of consent or context.” The consequences are concrete. “For Indigenous languages, missionary Bible translations become training data before communities have set any rules,” she said.

sentences.en: When asked about Big Tech’s multilingual push, Bdeir drew a sharp distinction.
sentences.zh: 当被问及大型科技公司的多语言推动时，Bdeir 做出了鲜明的区分。

sentences.en: “Big tech builds multilingual models to expand their market,” she said, “regardless of consent or context.”
sentences.zh: “大型科技公司建立多语言模型来扩大市场，”她说，“无论是否同意或背景如何。”

sentences.en: The consequences are concrete.
sentences.zh: 后果是具体的。

sentences.en: “For Indigenous languages, missionary Bible translations become training data before communities have set any rules,” she said.
sentences.zh: “对于土著语言来说，在社区制定任何规则之前，传教士圣经翻译就成为培训数据，”她说。

blocks.html_en: Not just about language

sentences.en: Not just about language
sentences.zh: 不只是语言的问题

blocks.html_en: An AI’s ability to speak a language is only part of what it needs to learn. “Language is how knowledge, tradition, memory and identity get carried from one generation to the next. So when a technology can’t speak your language, it can’t hold your culture either,” she said.

sentences.zh: 人工智能说语言的能力只是它需要学习的一部分。

sentences.en: “Language is how knowledge, tradition, memory and identity get carried from one generation to the next.
sentences.zh: “语言是知识、传统、记忆和身份从一代人传承到下一代的方式。

sentences.en: So when a technology can’t speak your language, it can’t hold your culture either,” she said.
sentences.zh: 因此，当一项技术无法讲你的语言时，它也无法容纳你的文化，”她说。

blocks.html_en: Her vision for Current AI is an open system modeled on the early web, where improvements benefit everyone, no one gets locked out, and communities keep control of their own data.

sentences.en: Her vision for Current AI is an open system modeled on the early web, where improvements benefit everyone, no one gets locked out, and communities keep control of their own data.
sentences.zh: 她对当前人工智能的愿景是建立一个以早期网络为模型的开放系统，其中的改进使每个人受益，没有人被排除在外，并且社区可以控制自己的数据。

blocks.html_en: Current’s first cohort grant round, announced last month, involved deploying $3.2 million to four organizations across Kenya, Lebanon, and the Brazilian Amazon.

sentences.en: Current’s first cohort grant round, announced last month, involved deploying $3.2 million to four organizations across Kenya, Lebanon, and the Brazilian Amazon.
sentences.zh: Current 上个月宣布的第一轮队列拨款涉及向肯尼亚、黎巴嫩和巴西亚马逊地区的四个组织部署 320 万美元。

blocks.html_en: The project in Masakhane, Kenya, involves building AI datasets across more than 50 African languages for health, farming, and education; Lebanon’s Institute for Worldmaking is digitizing Arab cultural history and contemporary practice into machine-readable databases that communities (not tech companies) control. And Kenya’s African Internet Rights Alliance is developing audit tools to hold AI systems accountable across the continent.

sentences.en: The project in Masakhane, Kenya, involves building AI datasets across more than 50 African languages for health, farming, and education; Lebanon’s Institute for Worldmaking is digitizing Arab cultural history and contemporary practice into machine-readable databases that communities (not tech companies) control.
sentences.zh: 该项目位于肯尼亚 Masakhane，涉及为健康、农业和教育领域构建跨 50 多种非洲语言的人工智能数据集；黎巴嫩世界创造研究所正在将阿拉伯文化历史和当代实践数字化成社区（而非科技公司）控制的机器可读数据库。

sentences.en: Brazil’s Portal sem Porteiras is building offline AI tools with Indigenous Amazon communities, keeping data within the territory.

sentences.en: And Kenya’s African Internet Rights Alliance is developing audit tools to hold AI systems accountable across the continent.
sentences.zh: 肯尼亚的非洲互联网权利联盟正在开发审计工具，以追究整个非洲大陆人工智能系统的责任。

sentences.zh: Current AI 还与 Sakana AI 达成了一项协议，Sakana AI 是一家总部位于东京的初创公司，因其在所谓的 Sovereign AI 方面的工作而闻名。

sentences.en: The two organizations plan to build a shared open-source AI stack, one designed to support the Japanese language and culture, but also communities across the Global South that dominant AI systems have largely ignored.
sentences.zh: 这两个组织计划建立一个共享的开源人工智能堆栈，旨在支持日本语言和文化，同时也支持占主导地位的人工智能系统在很大程度上忽视的南半球社区。

sentences.en: When you purchase through links in our articles, we may earn a small commission.
sentences.zh: 当您通过我们文章中的链接购买时，我们可能会赚取少量佣金。

sentences.en: This doesn’t affect our editorial independence.
sentences.zh: 这并不影响我们的编辑独立性。

content_html_zh:
印度农村的一位农民拍摄了濒临死亡的植物的照片。 她想在互联网上进行研究，但她不会说英语。 她不应该这样做。

这就是一家名为 Current AI 的非营利组织试图通过构建开放的公共人工智能基础设施来解决的问题。 2 月份的印度人工智能峰会上，它与印度政府人工智能语言部门 Bhashini 合作。 结果就是 Suno Sutra，印地语的意思是“聆听编年史”，这是一款口袋大小的离线设备，可以以 22 种印度语言运行人工智能，无需互联网。 “在印度，有数百种不同的语言和方言，但目前人工智能并不能代表它们，”现任 AI 首席执行官 Ayah Bdeir 在接受 TechCrunch 采访时表示。 该设备是开源的，可供开发者社区进行构建。

该非营利组织由 Martin Tisne 于 2025 年 2 月创立，目前发展迅速。 上个月，它向四个组织的项目拨款 320 万美元；最近（上周），它在日内瓦举行的人工智能公益峰会上推出了一款开源人工智能聊天机器人。

Bdeir 在领导 Mozilla 的人工智能战略后于 1 月加入。 她之前创立了littleBits，这是一家 STEM 教育公司，在 2019 年出售给 Sphero 之前，该公司为数百万儿童提供服务。

她告诉 TechCrunch，当前的人工智能以“公私合作伙伴关系”的形式运作，将政府、公司和慈善机构聚集在一起，为公益技术提供资金。 法国政府向 Current AI 提供了 1 亿美元的种子资金，福特基金会、麦克阿瑟基金会、DeepMind 和 Salesforce 也加入其中，使承诺资金总额达到 4 亿美元。 “他们不是投资者；他们是资助者，”布德尔说。

它要解决的问题很简单：当今每个主要的人工智能系统，从 OpenAI 到谷歌再到 Anthropic，都属于一家私营公司。 “如果人工智能确实是一项变革性技术，如果它要改变每个人生活的方方面面，就必须有一个公共替代方案，”Bdeir 说。 “就像万维网一样，任何人都可以免费使用。”

世界上一半的口语面临灭绝。 “随着英语驱动最大的语言模型和人工智能系统，世界上大部分语言以及文化和社区都被抛在了后面，”Bdeir 说。

当被问及大型科技公司的多语言推动时，Bdeir 做出了鲜明的区分。 “大型科技公司建立多语言模型来扩大市场，”她说，“无论是否同意或背景如何。” 后果是具体的。 “对于土著语言来说，在社区制定任何规则之前，传教士圣经翻译就成为培训数据，”她说。

不只是语言的问题

人工智能说语言的能力只是它需要学习的一部分。 “语言是知识、传统、记忆和身份从一代人传承到下一代的方式。 因此，当一项技术无法讲你的语言时，它也无法容纳你的文化，”她说。

她对当前人工智能的愿景是建立一个以早期网络为模型的开放系统，其中的改进使每个人受益，没有人被排除在外，并且社区可以控制自己的数据。

Current 上个月宣布的第一轮队列拨款涉及向肯尼亚、黎巴嫩和巴西亚马逊地区的四个组织部署 320 万美元。

该项目位于肯尼亚 Masakhane，涉及为健康、农业和教育领域构建跨 50 多种非洲语言的人工智能数据集；黎巴嫩世界创造研究所正在将阿拉伯文化历史和当代实践数字化成社区（而非科技公司）控制的机器可读数据库。 巴西的 Portal sem Porteiras 正在与亚马逊土著社区一起构建离线人工智能工具，将数据保存在境内。 肯尼亚的非洲互联网权利联盟正在开发审计工具，以追究整个非洲大陆人工智能系统的责任。

谁拥有数据？

在数据所有权问题上，Bdeir 毫不拐弯抹角。 “对于不同社区的数据拥有者有不同的模式和建议，但有一件事是肯定的：硅谷的一家公司不应该试图让少数几千人变得更富有，”她告诉 TechCrunch。

该非营利组织的方法是在本地存储模型和数据，在构建任何东西之前引入社区专家，或者将同意协议写入管道，以便社区可以随时停止该过程。

Current AI 的受资助者还没有完全解决这个问题。 但 Bdeir 认为这才是重点。 “他们每个人都将这个问题融入到自己的工作中，”她说，“而不是接受通常的默认做法，即复杂性成为让政府或科技公司为所有人做出决定的借口。”

至于将 320 万美元的预算分配给四个组织可以取得多大进展，Bdeir 表示，“规模并不总是衡量标准。 这就是大型科技范例，”她说。 “这看起来就像巴西亚马逊地区的土著长者使用肯尼亚制造的工具，能够用自己的语言传承生态知识。”

构建堆栈

本月早些时候，Current 在日内瓦推出了 Alpha Chat，这是一款开源聊天机器人，由 Hugging Face、Mozilla 和 MIT Media Lab 等 10 个组织组成的联盟在七周内组装而成。 每个贡献者都带来了堆栈的一部分，包括语言模型、安全工具和计算能力。

Current AI 还与 Sakana AI 达成了一项协议，Sakana AI 是一家总部位于东京的初创公司，因其在所谓的 Sovereign AI 方面的工作而闻名。 这两个组织计划建立一个共享的开源人工智能堆栈，旨在支持日本语言和文化，同时也支持占主导地位的人工智能系统在很大程度上忽视的南半球社区。

当您通过我们文章中的链接购买时，我们可能会赚取少量佣金。 这并不影响我们的编辑独立性。
